version_description: I've made this version because I think it sounds more like the way he sings the song rather than the guitar in the background and it is also a lot easier to play for a beginner like myself because I have deleted barre chords and your pinky and ring finger can be locked in on the 2 top strings on the 3rd fret throughout the song except when it comes to Am and D. This is my first complete edit of a tab so it's not how he plays it, but I think it sounds good for a simplified version https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=wronTfJF7Pk.

versions.version_description: Luke Combs has played a show to which he used these chords. He kept his baby finger and ring finger on both b and e string throughout. The D/F# is just your index finger on 2nd fret. You can use different strumming patterns to make the song sound like original with these chords. It's the same throughout the hole song. The strumming pattern is similar to the one shown.

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
The Intro is played on just the bottom 4 strings and D is the main anchor chord it starts with an A chord
then you slide your pinky finger up to the 5th fret (relative to capo)...then
hammer on 2nd fret g and e strings then to D then slide your pinky finger to the 7th fret then to
hammer on then off 2nd fret g and e then it finishes with a small walk down(D,Dsus2,Em, Cadd9),G
then into the first verse, this intro is also played at the first interlude but starts 
on a Dsus4 and finishes on the slide up to
7th fret, the outro is also the same, it's hard to explain here
but you will soon get the idea when you start this intro and if
you know the song, https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=8bjo95QKD3c
NOTE: this is NOT the exact version of the intro just similar.

[Chords]
[ch]G[/ch]      320033
[ch]D/F#[/ch]   200033
[ch]Em[/ch]     022033
[ch]Em7[/ch]    020033
[ch]Cadd9[/ch]  x32033
[ch]Dsus4[/ch]  xx0233
[ch]A[/ch] xx222x
[ch]Dsus2[/ch] xxx23x
[ch]D[/ch] xxx232

[Intro]
[ch]A[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]Dsus2[/ch] [ch]Em[/ch] [ch]Cadd9[/ch] 

[Verse 1]
[tab]            [ch]G[/ch]                 [ch]Cadd9[/ch]
Daddy I'm afraaaaid, won't you staaaay a little while,[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]G[/ch]                    [ch]Em7[/ch]             [ch]D/F#[/ch]
keep me safe  cause there's monsters right outside.[/tab]
[tab] [ch]D/F#[/ch]               [ch]G[/ch]
Daddy please don't go..,[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Cadd9[/ch]                    [ch]G[/ch]                 [ch]Em[/ch]                [ch]D/F#[/ch]
I don't wanna be alone cause the second that your gone they're gunna know![/tab]
[tab]          [ch]Em[/ch]              [ch]D/F#[/ch]             [ch]Cadd9[/ch]
Before he went to bed he grabbed my hand and said..[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]Cadd9[/ch]          [ch]G[/ch]                [ch]Cadd9[/ch]
just cause I'm leaving it don't mean that[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Em[/ch]               [ch]Cadd9[/ch]
I won't be right by your side[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]G[/ch]                     [ch]Cadd9[/ch]         [ch]Em[/ch]            [ch]Dsus4[/ch]
when you need me and you can't see me in the middle of the night[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]G[/ch]              [ch]Cadd9[/ch]
just close your eyes and say a prayer[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Em[/ch]               [ch]Cadd9[/ch]               [ch]G[/ch]
it's okay I know your scared when I'm not here[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Em7[/ch]             [ch]D/F#[/ch]
but I'll always be right there[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]G[/ch]              [ch]D/F#[/ch]
even though I'm leavin' I ain't goin'[/tab]
[tab] [ch]G[/ch] [ch]Cadd9[/ch]
nowhere[/tab]

[Interlude]
[ch]Dsus4[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]Dsus2[/ch] [ch]Em[/ch] [ch]Cadd9[/ch]

[Verse 2]
[tab]             [ch]G[/ch]
Dad we'll be late[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]Cadd9[/ch]
and Uncle Sam don't like to wait[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Em[/ch]                        [ch]G[/ch]           [ch]D/F#[/ch]
he's got a big old plane thats gonna take me far away[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]G[/ch]                    [ch]Cadd9[/ch]
I know I act tough, but there's a churnin'in my gut[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Em[/ch]                  [ch]G[/ch]                    [ch]D/F#[/ch]
'cause I just can't call you up when things get rough[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Em[/ch]                [ch]D/F#[/ch]  [ch]Cadd9[/ch]
before I left he hugged my neck, and said....[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]Cadd9[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch]
just 'cause I'm leavin'[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Cadd9[/ch]              [ch]Em[/ch]               [ch]Dsus4[/ch]
it don't mean that, I won't be right by your side[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]G[/ch]                     [ch]Cadd9[/ch]         [ch]Em[/ch]            [ch]Dsus4[/ch]
when you need me and you can't see me in the middle of the night[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]G[/ch]              [ch]Cadd9[/ch]
just close your eyes and say a prayer[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Em[/ch]               [ch]Cadd9[/ch]             [ch]G[/ch]
it's okay I know your scared I might be here[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]Em7[/ch]             [ch]D/F#[/ch]
but I'll always be right there[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]Em[/ch]              [ch]D/F#[/ch]
even though you're leavin' I ain't goin'[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]G[/ch]

Daddy Im afraaaaid, won't you staaay a little while[/tab]

Daddy please don't goooo[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]                [ch]G[/ch]
just 'cause i'm leavin'[/tab]

it don't mean that I won't be right by your side[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]G[/ch]                     [ch]Cadd9[/ch]          [ch]Em[/ch]           [ch]Dsus4[/ch]
when you need me and you can't see me in the middle of the night[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]G[/ch]              [ch]Cadd9[/ch]

[tab]    [ch]Em[/ch]                [ch]Cadd9[/ch]               [ch]Em[/ch]             [ch]Dsus4[/ch]          [ch]D/F#[/ch]
